Title: Tribesie
Tagline: Pre-crowdfunding and community-driven project design platform.
Description: Empowers influencers and fans to collaborate on the ideation, design, and pre-funding of creative ventures.
Slogan: From Ideation to Impact: Design Your Next Adventure with Your Tribe.
First Trend Description: The movement toward structured audience-led project requests.
Second Trend Description: Influencers moving away from ads toward bespoke project funding.
Third Trend Description: Using social networks to map collaborators before they join the platform.
First Benefit Description: Proposals are validated through RFPs and feedback before any financial investment is made.
Second Benefit Description: Audience members feel a sense of ownership over the projects they help design through voting.
Third Benefit Description: Pledges can be reassigned, reducing the fear of 'unfulfilled' projects.
Notes: Primary launch categories include theatrical dining and immersive cruises. Includes RFP to Proposal lifecycle, public/private targeting, and placeholder profile partner suggestions.
